description: Full Candidates Search - CSV export. Endpoint: GET /c/{company_id}/search/new/candidates/export. Required parameters: company_id. Optional parameters include sort_by, filters_json.

params.name: sort_by
params.description: Sort order (default: ‘created_at_desc’; possible values: ‘[relevance | created_at | candidate_name | candidate_rating | candidate_positive_ratings | candidate_job_title | candidate_stage_name]_[asc | desc]’)

params.name: filters_json
params.description: Array of filters ([FilterGroup, ...]), serialized to a JSON string
